summary: Frontend-only end-to-end test of the NEW /agency/* admin console + nurse-app agency branding pill. 45 of 45 functional checks passed after re-verification. All routes, data-testids, seeded data, invite flow (form -> success with routeme.app/invite/... link + Copy), pending copy-invite buttons, row action menu Activate/Deactivate, filters, search, live activity, clients directory (with initials + full name), compliance (98/100, Encryption/MFA/Audit/BAA cards, export-audit-btn), billing (Starter/Growth/Scale with Growth = Current plan), HIPAA badge persistence, logout, protected-route redirect, and nurse top-bar 'Sunrise Home Health' pill all verified. Two independent auth flows confirmed (localStorage keys 'authed' and 'agencyAuthed' are separate).

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog shows TWO close (X) icons in the top-right corner of the success screen (one from Radix DialogContent default + one custom). Visual duplication.

issues: PHI framing is inconsistent: the initials badge (e.g., 'E.M') is shown but the FULL first name + last-initial (e.g., 'Eleanor M.') is rendered next to it in the same cell. If the intent is HIPAA-safe PHI masking, showing the full given name defeats the purpose. Suggest hiding full name in the list, or make it reveal-on-click gated by role.

console_errors.error: In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>. This will cause a hydration error.
console_errors.location: ClientsDir.jsx line 53 — the <option> inside <select data-testid='ac-nurse-filter'> is rendering a visual-editor-injected <span style={{display:'contents'}}> around the dynamic nurse name text. React logs this as an error on every render.
console_errors.note: Likely a visual-editor artifact but React still flags it. Consider wrapping option text so it does not receive x-source markers, or accept as a preview-only noise.

console_errors.error: DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for accessibility; also missing Description/aria-describedby.
console_errors.note: Radix a11y warning. Add a VisuallyHidden DialogTitle + DialogDescription (or the Radix Description component) inside the invite dialog.

passed: Landing has landing-agency-link -> /agency/login
Agency login form prefilled (code SUNRISE-2026, priya@sunrisehh.demo, demo1234); submit -> /agency/overview
Overview shows KPIs (Active nurses, Visits today, Weekly time saved, HIPAA), on-shift list, agency-wide savings dark card, live activity, Zones, Sunrise branding
Sidebar nav all 6 links route correctly (overview/nurses/activity/clients/compliance/billing)
Nurses page shows all 6 seeded nurses (Amara, Marcus, Devi, Jonah pending, Priya, Derek inactive)
Filter pills All/Active/Pending/Inactive all filter correctly (verified pending -> only Jonah)
nurse-search filters rows in real time
Invite dialog: form -> success state shows 'Invite sent to <email>' + 'https://routeme.app/invite/n_...' + Copy + Done buttons
New nurse appears at top of roster after invite with Pending pill
Pending rows expose copy-invite-{id} button (verified 2 present after invite)
Row action menu three-dots -> Activate/Deactivate updates status pill
Activity page shows event stream and activity-nurse-filter select
Clients dir shows table, ac-search + ac-nurse-filter present, initials badges (E.M, R.T, M.K, etc.) shown
Compliance page shows 98/100, Encryption/MFA/Audit/BAA metric cards, export-audit-btn present
Billing shows Growth as Current plan card, seat utilization bar 6/20 30%, Starter/Growth/Scale plan cards, Invoices table
HIPAA badge persistent top-right on every /agency route
agency-logout-btn signs out -> /agency/login; /agency/overview redirects to /agency/login when unauthed
Nurse app top bar shows 'Sunrise Home Health' agency branding pill after /login
Two auth flows independent (nurse login does not grant agency access and vice versa)
login-agency-link present on nurse /login page
action_items: Optional: remove the duplicate close X icon in the invite success dialog.
Optional: mask the client full given name in the agency clients directory (leave only initials + last-name-initial) to make the PHI-safe framing consistent.

Optional: fix ClientsDir.jsx line 53 <option> content so React does not emit the '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' hydration error (either use a plain text expression not wrapped by the visual editor, or accept as preview-only noise).
Optional: add VisuallyHidden DialogTitle + DialogDescription inside the invite dialog to silence Radix a11y warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: AgencyProtected + Protected wrappers correctly gate /agency and /app independently via separate localStorage keys — clean and consistent.
PHI display in Clients directory: renders both initials badge AND the client's actual first name — inconsistent with the 'PHI-safe' brand story; recommend masking behind a reveal action.
ClientsDir <select><option> content injection breaks HTML nesting rules (React hydration error) — small refactor needed.
test_credentials: Agency: SUNRISE-2026 / priya@sunrisehh.demo / demo1234 (prefilled, any values work — mocked). Nurse: amara.okafor@nurse.demo / demo1234 (prefilled).
seed_data_creation: Invite created 2 test nurses (TEST Nurse, TEST Two) via UI. Both persist in localStorage; can be cleared via Profile > clear-data-btn.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The agency console is feature-complete and stable. localStorage persists nurses across sessions, so invite/activate/deactivate side effects accumulate — clear localStorage before re-running the full suite for a clean seed. All new data-testids listed in the review request are wired correctly.
